notFound.description: The address may be incorrect or the page has been moved.

login.title: Sign in
login.tagline: Take care of your parents together with your siblings
login.missingClientId: Define NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env.local (Google Web Client ID).
login.googleNotReady: Google login hasn't loaded yet. Please wait or refresh the page.

onboarding.description: To get started, create your family:
onboarding.adminNote: By creating, you will be the administrator and can invite your siblings.

home.title: Project Ours
home.subtitle: Family goals and activities, with privacy between members.

apiHealth.missingUrl: For direct API host calls, set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL. With Next proxy (`/api`), leave empty and use BACKEND_URL in .env.local for the rewrite.
apiHealth.error: Check if the server is running and if the port matches launchSettings (5280).
